mapper.insert: insert into pf_equipment_repair(equipment_id, equipment_no, equipment_name, reporter_id, reporter_name, fault_desc, report_time, status, create_time, update_time) values(#{equipmentId}, #{equipmentNo}, #{equipmentName}, #{reporterId}, #{reporterName}, #{faultDesc}, now(), 'REPORTED', now(), now())
mapper.update: update pf_equipment_repair set audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_time = now(), auditor_name = #{auditorName}, status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update pf_equipment_repair set repair_start_time = now(), status = 'REPAIRING', update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update pf_equipment_repair set repair_end_time = now(), repair_desc = #{repairDesc}, repair_cost = #{repairCost}, status = 'FIXED', update_time = now() where id = #{id}
